source_code:
CREATE TABLE GKBWSENTAKUSEI
(
    SOFU_YUBIN                     NVARCHAR2(10),
    SOFU_JUSHO                     NVARCHAR2(186),
    ATESAKI_KATAGAKI               NVARCHAR2(300),
    ATESAKI                        NVARCHAR2(102),
    YUBIN_NOBC                     NVARCHAR2(30),
    SOFUBI                         NVARCHAR2(11),
    KYOIKU_KAI_MEI                 NVARCHAR2(60),
    KYOIKU_CHO_MEI                 NVARCHAR2(100),
    GAKKO_KBN_CD                   NUMBER(3,0),
    GAKKO_KBN_MEI                  NVARCHAR2(15),
    JIDO_KOJIN_NO                  NUMBER(15,0),
    JIDO_SHIMEI_KANA               NVARCHAR2(100),
    JIDO_SHIMEI_KANJI              NVARCHAR2(100),
    HYOJI_SEINENGAPPI              NVARCHAR2(11),
    CHOMEI_BANCHI                  NVARCHAR2(186),
    KATAGAKI                       NVARCHAR2(300),
    SEIBETSU                       NVARCHAR2(4),
    JIDO_KOKUSEKI                  NUMBER(3,0),
    JIDO_SHIENSOCHI                NVARCHAR2(2),
    HOGOSHA_KOJIN_NO               NUMBER(15,0),
    HOGOSHA_SHIMEI_KANA            NVARCHAR2(100),
    HOGOSHA_SHIMEI_KANJI           NVARCHAR2(100),
    HOGOSHA_ZOKUGARA               NVARCHAR2(30),
    HOGOSHA_SHIENSOCHI             NVARCHAR2(2),
    SHUGAKUSHITEIKOU               NUMBER(3,0),
    SHUGAKUSHITEIKOU_MEI           NVARCHAR2(60),
    KYOIKUIINKAI_CD                NUMBER(2,0),
    GAKKOBLOCK_CD                  NUMBER(3,0),
    HYOJI_SENTAKUKANO_GAKKO        NVARCHAR2(1000),
    JINKAKU_KBN                    NUMBER(1,0),
    WSNUM                          NVARCHAR2(63),
    BATCHKBN                       NUMBER(2,0),
    JOBNUM                         NUMBER(38,0),
    YUHEN_KBN                      NUMBER(1,0)
)
TABLESPACE GK_DATA
NOCACHE
LOGGING
/
COMMENT ON TABLE GKBWSENTAKUSEI IS '選択制対象者ワーク'
/
COMMENT ON COLUMN GKBWSENTAKUSEI.SOFU_YUBIN IS '送付先郵便番号'
/
COMMENT ON COLUMN GKBWSENTAKUSEI.SOFU_JUSHO IS '送付先住所'
/
COMMENT ON COLUMN GKBWSENTAKUSEI.ATESAKI_KATAGAKI IS '宛先方書'
/
COMMENT ON COLUMN GKBWSENTAKUSEI.ATESAKI IS '宛先'
/
COMMENT ON COLUMN GKBWSENTAKUSEI.YUBIN_NOBC IS '郵便番号BC'
/
COMMENT ON COLUMN GKBWSENTAKUSEI.SOFUBI IS '送付日'
/
COMMENT ON COLUMN GKBWSENTAKUSEI.KYOIKU_KAI_MEI IS '教育委員会名'
/
COMMENT ON COLUMN GKBWSENTAKUSEI.KYOIKU_CHO_MEI IS '教育長名'
/
COMMENT ON COLUMN GKBWSENTAKUSEI.GAKKO_KBN_CD IS '学校区分'
/
COMMENT ON COLUMN GKBWSENTAKUSEI.GAKKO_KBN_MEI IS '学校区分名'
/
COMMENT ON COLUMN GKBWSENTAKUSEI.JIDO_KOJIN_NO IS '児童生徒宛名番号'
/
COMMENT ON COLUMN GKBWSENTAKUSEI.JIDO_SHIMEI_KANA IS '児童生徒氏名カナ'
/
COMMENT ON COLUMN GKBWSENTAKUSEI.JIDO_SHIMEI_KANJI IS '児童生徒氏名漢字'
/
COMMENT ON COLUMN GKBWSENTAKUSEI.HYOJI_SEINENGAPPI IS '表示生年月日'
/
COMMENT ON COLUMN GKBWSENTAKUSEI.CHOMEI_BANCHI IS '児童生徒現住所'
/
COMMENT ON COLUMN GKBWSENTAKUSEI.KATAGAKI IS '児童生徒方書'
/
COMMENT ON COLUMN GKBWSENTAKUSEI.SEIBETSU IS '性別'
/
COMMENT ON COLUMN GKBWSENTAKUSEI.JIDO_KOKUSEKI IS '児童生徒国籍'
/
COMMENT ON COLUMN GKBWSENTAKUSEI.JIDO_SHIENSOCHI IS '児童生徒_支援措置'
/
COMMENT ON COLUMN GKBWSENTAKUSEI.HOGOSHA_KOJIN_NO IS '保護者宛名番号'
/
COMMENT ON COLUMN GKBWSENTAKUSEI.HOGOSHA_SHIMEI_KANA IS '保護者氏名カナ'
/
COMMENT ON COLUMN GKBWSENTAKUSEI.HOGOSHA_SHIMEI_KANJI IS '保護者氏名漢字'
/
COMMENT ON COLUMN GKBWSENTAKUSEI.HOGOSHA_ZOKUGARA IS '児童生徒との関係'
/
COMMENT ON COLUMN GKBWSENTAKUSEI.HOGOSHA_SHIENSOCHI IS '保護者_支援措置'
/
COMMENT ON COLUMN GKBWSENTAKUSEI.SHUGAKUSHITEIKOU IS '就学指定校'
/
COMMENT ON COLUMN GKBWSENTAKUSEI.SHUGAKUSHITEIKOU_MEI IS '就学指定校名'
/
COMMENT ON COLUMN GKBWSENTAKUSEI.KYOIKUIINKAI_CD IS '教育委員会コード'
/
COMMENT ON COLUMN GKBWSENTAKUSEI.GAKKOBLOCK_CD IS '学校ブロック'
/
COMMENT ON COLUMN GKBWSENTAKUSEI.HYOJI_SENTAKUKANO_GAKKO IS '表示選択可能学校'
/
COMMENT ON COLUMN GKBWSENTAKUSEI.JINKAKU_KBN IS '人格区分'
/
COMMENT ON COLUMN GKBWSENTAKUSEI.WSNUM IS '端末番号'
/
COMMENT ON COLUMN GKBWSENTAKUSEI.BATCHKBN IS '即時バッチ区分'
/
COMMENT ON COLUMN GKBWSENTAKUSEI.JOBNUM IS 'ジョブNO'
/
COMMENT ON COLUMN GKBWSENTAKUSEI.YUHEN_KBN IS '郵返区分'
/
